note: CBPR+ Nov-2026 pacs.008 PostalAddress24 lint. Vector 1: fully-structured compliant. Vector 2: hybrid with silent-fail duplication (known-vector assert). Vector 3: empty-input finite.

vectors.name: fully_structured_compliant
vectors.description: Fully-structured address with all ISO fields populated, no AdrLine. Compliant with CBPR+ Nov-2026 mandate.

output_payload.disambiguation: lint_cbpr_structured_address checks per-message Nov-2026 hybrid/fully-structured rule lint including the AdrLine silent-fail duplication rule. For batch verification of already-migrated address archives use verify_address_migration_batch (rca-03). For ISO 20022 securities settlement messages (sese/semt) use lint_securities_settlement_message (art-82). This tool operates on pacs.008 payments address blocks only.
output_payload.pii_note: All fields operate on STRUCTURAL address components only. No real party PII enters this kernel -- use synthetic or anonymised address data.
output_payload.table_source: SWIFT CBPR+ Structured Address Migration Bulletin (verify current guidance at swift.com/cbpr-plus-migration); ISO 20022 PostalAddress24 element set (iso20022.org MX catalogue)
output_payload.regulatory_basis: SWIFT CBPR+ Structured Address Migration Bulletin; ISO 20022 PostalAddress24 element set (MX catalogue); SEPA and CHAPS aligned Nov 2026

vectors.name: hybrid_silent_fail_duplication
vectors.description: Hybrid address (TwnNm+Ctry+2 AdrLine) where AdrLine duplicates structured field values -- the silent-fail duplication rule that causes STP rejection without a visible error code.

violations.message: AdrLine[0] duplicates structured field value "Main Street" -- this silent-fail causes STP rejection without a visible error code. Remove the duplicated component from AdrLine.
AdrLine[1] duplicates structured field value "London" -- this silent-fail causes STP rejection without a visible error code. Remove the duplicated component from AdrLine.

output_payload.disambiguation: lint_cbpr_structured_address checks per-message Nov-2026 hybrid/fully-structured rule lint including the AdrLine silent-fail duplication rule. vectors.name: empty_input_finite
vectors.description: Empty input -- all address fields absent. Verifies finite output (no NaN/Infinity) and EMPTY structure type detection.

violations.message: No address fields populated. pacs.008 requires a populated PostalAddress24 block.
